hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE=$(cat | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"file_path\",\"\"))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "\.(v|sv)$"; then bash .claude/hooks/post_verilog_generate.sh; if grep -q "%Error" sim/logs/lint.log 2>/dev/null; then bash .claude/hooks/on_lint_fail.sh; fi; fi'
